recent_visits.notes: Patient reports chest pain for 2 hours. ECG ordered. Given aspirin 325mg. Vitals stable.
Routine follow-up for HTN and T2DM. HbA1c 7.8. Continue metformin, add lifestyle advice.
recent_visits.summary: Follow-up for hypertension and diabetes; medications continued.

patient_summary.transcript_text: Doctor: What brings you in today? Patient: I have had chest pain for about 2 hours, goes to my left arm. Doctor: Any sweating or shortness of breath? Patient: Yes, a bit. Doctor: We will do an ECG and blood tests. I am giving you aspirin now. Please stay for observation.
patient_summary.patient_context: Hypertension, Type 2 diabetes. On metformin and amlodipine.
